nasb.text: “Thus says the Lord who made the earth, the Lord who formed it to establish it, the Lord is His name,

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord who made the earth, the Lord who formed it to establish it—the Lord is his name:

cnv.text: “那創造、塑造和堅定大地的是耶和華，耶和華是他的名。他這樣說：

ccb.text: “耶和华创造大地，使其成形、根基稳固，祂名叫耶和华。祂说，
